title: Aspidium subpedatum
taxonomy: Aspidium subpedatum, which is now classified as Thelypteris subpedata, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia. It belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Thelypteris subpedata is a type of deciduous fern that grows in shaded areas and is often found in moist, humid environments. The classification of Thelypteris subpedata is based on its morphology and reproductive characteristics. As a member of the Thelypteridaceae family, it shares similarities with other species of the same family.
